technology.title: More US firms turn to China’s DeepSeek over pricey Silicon Valley AI
technology.summary: Chinese artificial intelligence start-up DeepSeek took the top spot on a major US business spending index in June, as more companies swap out expensive American options like OpenAI and Anthropic in favour of more affordable alternatives. According to a “trending software vendors” list from New York-based corporate spending platform Ramp – which tracks when businesses buy from a software vendor for the first time – DeepSeek’s rise placed it ahead of event-management platform PheedLoop and...

briefing.news_focus: Chinese artificial intelligence start-up DeepSeek took the top spot on a major US business spending index in June, as more companies swap out expensive American options like OpenAI and Anthropic in favour of more affordable alternatives. According to a “trending software vendors” list from New York-based corporate spending platform Ramp – which tracks when businesses buy from a software vendor for the first time – DeepSeek’s rise placed it ahead of event-management platform PheedLoop and...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國人工智慧初創公司DeepSeek在美國商業支出指數中名列前茅，顯示越來越多美國企業選擇其相對便宜的產品，取代昂貴的美國選項如OpenAI和Anthropic。根據美國企業支出平台Ramp的數據，DeepSeek的崛起使其超越了其他平台，成為當前最受歡迎的軟體供應商之一。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的快速發展，許多企業面臨著高昂的技術成本，尤其是來自矽谷的解決方案。這促使企業尋求更具成本效益的替代品，尤其是在全球市場中，許多新興的AI基礎設施正在形成。根據參考報導，印度、巴西、阿聯酋及非洲等地的本地技術堆疊正是為了應對計算資源的稀缺而設計，這顯示出全球AI創新正在向外擴展，挑戰傳統的矽谷主導地位。
briefing.analysis: DeepSeek的成功反映了美國企業對成本效益的重視，尤其是在當前經濟環境下，企業更傾向於尋找價格合理的解決方案。這一趨勢可能會促使更多中國及其他國家的AI公司進一步擴展其市場份額，挑戰美國科技公司的主導地位。參考報導指出，全球多地的AI創新正在興起，這表明市場競爭正在加劇，並可能導致技術的多元化發展。各方利益關係中，美國企業希望降低成本，而中國及新興市場的企業則希望擴大影響力，這將改變未來的科技格局。

supporting_titles: Scarcity is driving AI innovation outside Silicon Valley
supporting_summaries: New AI infrastructure is emerging in India, Brazil, the UAE, and Africa, where local stacks are designed to get around compute scarcity.

technology.title: Scarcity is driving AI innovation outside Silicon Valley
technology.summary: New AI infrastructure is emerging in India, Brazil, the UAE, and Africa, where local stacks are designed to get around compute scarcity.

briefing.news_focus: New AI infrastructure is emerging in India, Brazil, the UAE, and Africa, where local stacks are designed to get around compute scarcity.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著計算資源的稀缺性影響，印度、巴西、阿聯酋及非洲等地正在興起新的人工智慧基礎設施，這些地方的本地技術堆疊旨在繞過計算資源的限制，推動當地的AI創新。
briefing.background: 在全球科技競爭中，計算資源的稀缺性已成為一個重要挑戰，尤其是在發展中國家。這些國家面臨著高昂的雲計算成本，促使他們尋求本地化的解決方案。印度、巴西、阿聯酋及非洲等地的企業和初創公司正努力建立本地的AI基礎設施，以滿足日益增長的需求，並減少對外部供應商的依賴。這一趨勢不僅有助於降低成本，還能促進當地技術的發展和創新。
briefing.analysis: 各國在AI基礎設施的發展上展現出不同的利益動態。印度和巴西等國的企業正試圖利用本地資源來克服計算資源的不足，這可能會導致他們在全球市場中獲得更大的競爭優勢。參考報導中提到的中國初創公司DeepSeek的崛起，顯示出美國企業正在轉向更具成本效益的選擇，這可能會影響美國科技公司的市場份額。這兩者之間的動態顯示出全球AI市場正在發生變化，企業在選擇供應商時越來越重視成本效益，而非僅僅依賴於傳統的美國科技公司。

supporting_titles: More US firms turn to China’s DeepSeek over pricey Silicon Valley AI
supporting_summaries: Chinese artificial intelligence start-up DeepSeek took the top spot on a major US business spending index in June, as more companies swap out expensive American options like OpenAI and Anthropic in favour of more affordable alternatives. According to a “trending software vendors” list from New York-based corporate spending platform Ramp – which tracks when businesses buy from a software vendor for the first time – DeepSeek’s rise placed it ahead of event-management platform PheedLoop and...

technology.title: A Chinese robotics start-up beat Nvidia on a global AI ranking. Is a new tech war brewing?
technology.summary: As artificial intelligence steps out of the digital realm and into the real world, the race to build the embodied “brains” powering next-generation robots has become the newest battleground in tech competition between China and the United States. Two days after US chip giant Nvidia launched its Cosmos 3 model – designed to help physical AI “think before it acts” – a Chinese start-up stole the spotlight. On Wednesday, Hangzhou, Zhejiang province-based Spirit AI said its foundation model for...

briefing.news_focus: As artificial intelligence steps out of the digital realm and into the real world, the race to build the embodied “brains” powering next-generation robots has become the newest battleground in tech competition between China and the United States. Two days after US chip giant Nvidia launched its Cosmos 3 model – designed to help physical AI “think before it acts” – a Chinese start-up stole the spotlight. On Wednesday, Hangzhou, Zhejiang province-based Spirit AI said its foundation model for...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國杭州的機器人初創公司Spirit AI在全球人工智慧排名中超越了美國芯片巨頭Nvidia，成為焦點。此事件發生在Nvidia推出其新款Cosmos 3模型的兩天後，該模型旨在幫助實體AI在行動前進行思考。Spirit AI的基礎模型被認為是推動下一代機器人技術的重要突破，顯示出中美之間在科技競爭中的新動態。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，特別是在機器人領域，全球科技競爭愈發激烈。美國在AI硬體和軟體方面長期佔據領先地位，Nvidia作為主要的AI芯片供應商，推出的Cosmos 3模型被視為其在市場上的一大創新。然而，中國在這一領域的投資和技術進步也不容小覷，尤其是在機器人和自動化技術方面。Spirit AI的崛起顯示出中國企業在AI技術上的迅速進步，可能會改變全球科技格局。
briefing.analysis: Spirit AI的成功標誌著中國在AI技術上的快速進步，這可能引發中美之間新一輪的科技競爭。Nvidia的Cosmos 3模型專注於提升AI的決策能力，而Spirit AI的基礎模型則可能在實體機器人應用上有更大的突破。這一競爭不僅涉及技術創新，還可能影響到全球供應鏈和市場格局。參考報導提到的Majorana 2芯片，雖然未直接與Spirit AI的模型比較，但顯示出Nvidia在持續推出新技術以維持其市場地位。各方的技術進步可能會導致更激烈的市場競爭，並引發政策和經濟上的反應。

supporting_summaries: The tech company announces its new Majorana 2 chip.

politics.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
politics.summary: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.

briefing.news_focus: The countries reject "any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage", the US says.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列和黎巴嫩在美國的主導下達成了停火框架，條件是真主黨必須停止對以色列的攻擊。美方強調，任何國家或非國家行為者都不應該將黎巴嫩的未來作為人質，這表明了對黎巴嫩主權的支持。
briefing.background: 以色列和黎巴嫩之間的緊張關係由來已久，特別是由於真主黨的武裝活動。近期，隨著衝突升級，雙方的軍事行動加劇，導致民眾恐慌和人道危機。美國在此背景下介入，試圖促成停火，以防止局勢進一步惡化。美方的立場強調了對黎巴嫩主權的尊重，並希望透過外交手段解決衝突。
briefing.analysis: 此次停火框架的達成，雖然是美國外交努力的結果，但真主黨的缺席使得執行的可行性受到質疑。真主黨是否會遵守停火協議仍然是個未知數，這可能會影響以色列和黎巴嫩的安全局勢。此外，根據參考報導，最近以色列對黎巴嫩南部的攻擊造成了多名死傷，這使得停火的前景更加複雜。各方在此問題上的立場存在差異，以色列希望通過強硬手段迫使真主黨退讓，而黎巴嫩則希望能夠維護國內穩定，避免進一步的軍事衝突。

supporting_titles: Israel and Lebanon agree on ceasefire framework in US-led talks
Israel kills 8 in southern Lebanon, a day after Trump said Israel and Hezbollah to de-escalate
supporting_summaries: The US announced an Israel-Lebanon ceasefire framework, but Hezbollah's absence leaves questions over enforcement.
Israel threatened on June 1 to strike Beirut's southern suburbs, causing panic in the Lebanese capital as thousands fled to safer areas and Hezbollah fired rockets at northern Israel

politics.title: Portugal, Austria among five nations elected to UN Security Council; Germany suffers setback
politics.summary: The five new non-permanent UNSC members were elected by secret ballot for the two-year term beginning from January 1, 2027, and ending on December 31, 2028

briefing.news_focus: The five new non-permanent UNSC members were elected by secret ballot for the two-year term beginning from January 1, 2027, and ending on December 31, 2028
briefing.news_focus_zh: 葡萄牙和奧地利在激烈競爭中成功當選為聯合國安理會的五個新非永久成員，這一任期將從2027年1月1日開始，至2028年12月31日結束。德國在此次選舉中遭遇挫敗，未能獲得席位。
briefing.background: 聯合國安理會由15個成員國組成，其中五個為永久成員，擁有否決權。每年，安理會會選舉五個非永久成員，任期為兩年，這些席位通常會根據地區分配。此次選舉中，葡萄牙和奧地利的當選反映了國際政治中各國間的競爭與合作，特別是在面對全球性議題時，各國的外交策略和影響力變得尤為重要。
briefing.analysis: 此次選舉中，德國的失利引發了各方關注。根據BBC的報導，德國官員Johann Wadephul指出，德國對烏克蘭的支持使得俄羅斯在國際上對德國的形象產生了負面影響，這可能是德國未能當選的原因之一。與此同時，SCMP的報導強調了葡萄牙和奧地利在激烈競爭中的成功，顯示出這兩國在外交上的積極努力。這次結果不僅影響德國的國際地位，也可能改變安理會內部的權力動態，特別是在處理與俄羅斯相關的議題時。

supporting_titles: Portugal and Austria defeat Germany for seats on UN Security Council
Germany blames Russia for 'bitter defeat' in UN Security Council bid
supporting_summaries: Portugal and Austria defeated Germany for seats on the powerful but deeply divided UN Security Council on Wednesday in a hotly contested race after intense campaigning. The 10 rotating seats on the 15-member Security Council are earmarked for different regions of the world. The assembly elects five countries by secret ballot every year to serve two-year terms alongside the council’s five permanent veto-wielding members — the United States, Russia, China, Britain and France. In the other...
Johann Wadephul said it was "no secret" Russia had stirred up sentiment against Germany over its support for Ukraine.

politics.title: Germany admits failure to secure UNSC seat likely due to support for Israel
politics.summary: For the first time, Germany has failed to win a non-permanent seat on the UN Security Council.

briefing.news_focus: For the first time, Germany has failed to win a non-permanent seat on the UN Security Council.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 德國首次未能獲得聯合國安全理事會的非永久席位，這一結果被認為與其對以色列的支持有關。德國政府承認，這一失敗反映出其在國際政治中的影響力不足，特別是在中東問題上的立場引發了其他國家的反感。
briefing.background: 德國長期以來在國際事務中扮演重要角色，尤其是在歐洲政治中。然而，隨著全球政治格局的變化，德國在聯合國的影響力受到挑戰。特別是在以色列與巴勒斯坦的衝突中，德國的支持立場使其在某些國家中失去支持，這可能影響其在國際組織中的地位。聯合國安全理事會的非永久席位競爭激烈，其他國家如印度和巴西等也在積極爭取這一位置，德國的失利可能反映出其外交政策需要調整以贏得更多國際支持。
briefing.analysis: 德國未能獲得聯合國安全理事會的非永久席位，顯示出其在國際政治中的某些局限性。支持以色列的立場可能使德國在一些國家中失去信任，尤其是在阿拉伯國家和其他支持巴勒斯坦的國家中。這一結果可能促使德國重新評估其外交政策，以增強其在國際舞台上的影響力。此外，這也可能影響德國在歐洲內部的外交策略，特別是在與其他歐盟國家的合作上。未來，德國可能需要尋求更廣泛的國際支持，以提高其在聯合國的地位。

economy.title: U.S. sanctions alleged rebel commanders in DR Congo
economy.summary: The sanctions target Gustave Kubwayo, alleged to be the commander of FDLR, and John Imani Nzenze, alleged to be the March 23 (M23) commander and chief of intelligence, says the U.S. Treasury in a statement

briefing.news_focus: The sanctions target Gustave Kubwayo, alleged to be the commander of FDLR, and John Imani Nzenze, alleged to be the March 23 (M23) commander and chief of intelligence, says the U.S. Treasury in a statement
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國財政部針對剛果民主共和國的兩名叛軍指揮官實施制裁，分別是被指控為FDLR指揮官的古斯塔夫·庫布瓦約（Gustave Kubwayo）和被指控為3月23日運動（M23）指揮官及情報首席的約翰·伊馬尼·恩岑澤（John Imani Nzenze）。此舉旨在打擊這些叛軍的活動及其對當地穩定的威脅。
briefing.background: 剛果民主共和國長期受到內戰及叛軍活動的困擾，FDLR和M23是主要的武裝團體。FDLR成立於1994年，主要由盧旺達大屠殺的倖存者組成，而M23則是2012年成立的叛軍，因其對政府的挑戰而受到國際關注。美國的制裁措施通常是為了削弱這些武裝團體的資金來源，並促進地區的和平與穩定。這些制裁也反映了國際社會對剛果民主共和國局勢的持續關注。
briefing.analysis: 美國對這兩名叛軍指揮官的制裁，顯示出其對剛果民主共和國持續衝突的強烈關切，並試圖透過經濟制裁來減少叛軍的影響力。這些制裁可能會影響到叛軍的資金流動及其軍事行動能力，進而對當地的安全局勢產生影響。然而，這也可能引發叛軍的反應，進一步加劇地區的不穩定。此外，制裁的有效性在於國際社會的支持，若其他國家不跟隨美國的制裁措施，則可能削弱其影響力。各方對於如何解決剛果的衝突存在不同看法，部分國家可能更傾向於透過外交途徑解決問題，而非單純依賴制裁。

economy.title: Lula thanks China for beef win and tells US after tariffs: ‘I will sell to someone else’
economy.summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva thanked China for clearing the country’s beef of foot-and-mouth disease and fired a barb at US President Donald Trump, saying “I will sell to someone else”, after Washington announced new tariffs on Brazilian goods. Lula made the remarks on Tuesday, hours after Beijing announced wider access for Brazilian beef to the world’s biggest market for the product. “As God writes straight with crooked lines, nothing comes free for a Christian man like me....

briefing.news_focus: Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva thanked China for clearing the country’s beef of foot-and-mouth disease and fired a barb at US President Donald Trump, saying “I will sell to someone else”, after Washington announced new tariffs on Brazilian goods. Lula made the remarks on Tuesday, hours after Beijing announced wider access for Brazilian beef to the world’s biggest market for the product. “As God writes straight with crooked lines, nothing comes free for a Christian man like me....
briefing.news_focus_zh: 巴西總統盧拉感謝中國解除巴西牛肉的口蹄疫禁令，並在美國宣布對巴西商品加徵新關稅後，對美國總統特朗普表示「我會賣給別人」。此番言論是在中國宣布擴大巴西牛肉進入市場的幾小時後發表的，顯示出巴西在面對美國貿易政策時的靈活應對。
briefing.background: 巴西是全球主要的牛肉生產國之一，對中國市場的依賴程度逐漸增加。中國是全球最大的牛肉消費國，對巴西牛肉的需求穩定。近期，美國對巴西商品加徵新關稅，這使得巴西在貿易上面臨挑戰。美國的貿易政策，尤其是針對農產品的關稅，可能會促使巴西尋求其他市場，特別是中國，以減少對美國市場的依賴。
briefing.analysis: 盧拉的言論反映了巴西在面對美國貿易壓力時的策略調整，強調了中國市場的重要性。參考報導指出，美國的關稅政策可能促使企業尋求「中國加一」的策略，即在中國以外的地區尋找替代供應鏈。這意味著巴西可能會加強與中國的經濟合作，並在其他市場尋找機會。不同報導的重點在於，The Economist強調了新關稅對全球供應鏈的影響，而Nikkei Asia則提及美國對多國的強硬立場，顯示出美國在全球貿易中的主導地位可能受到挑戰。

supporting_titles: Who will win from Trump’s tariffs?
US floats new tariffs on 60 economies over forced labor, including China
supporting_summaries: New rates mean new “China plus one” locations

economy.title: IPOs, expansion plans give China’s US$16 billion pet food sector paws for thought
economy.summary: Home-grown and foreign pet business operators are bullish on China’s booming pet market this year, eyeing initial public offerings and localising supply chains, fuelled by young consumers’ growing interest in their animals’ health and wellness. Fubei, a major domestic pet food maker based in Shanghai, filed its IPO application with the Hong Kong stock exchange on Monday. The company has built a diversified product portfolio centred on cat and dog food, according to its prospectus. The number of...

briefing.news_focus: Home-grown and foreign pet business operators are bullish on China’s booming pet market this year, eyeing initial public offerings and localising supply chains, fuelled by young consumers’ growing interest in their animals’ health and wellness. Fubei, a major domestic pet food maker based in Shanghai, filed its IPO application with the Hong Kong stock exchange on Monday. The company has built a diversified product portfolio centred on cat and dog food, according to its prospectus. The number of...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的寵物食品市場在2023年持續蓬勃發展，吸引本地及外國企業的關注。上海的主要寵物食品製造商Fubei於本週一向香港交易所提交了首次公開募股（IPO）申請，計劃擴大其業務。該公司專注於貓狗食品，並在其招股說明書中展示了多樣化的產品組合。年輕消費者對寵物健康與福祉的日益重視，成為市場增長的重要推動力。
briefing.background: 中國的寵物食品市場在過去幾年中迅速增長，市場規模已達到160億美元。這一增長主要受到年輕消費者對寵物健康和生活品質的重視所驅動。隨著消費者對高品質、健康產品的需求增加，許多企業開始本地化供應鏈，以降低成本並提高產品的市場競爭力。此外，IPO成為企業擴展資本和業務的重要途徑，許多公司正計劃在香港等地上市，以吸引投資者的關注。
briefing.analysis: 中國的寵物食品市場吸引了眾多企業的目光，Fubei的IPO申請顯示出市場的活力及未來的增長潛力。隨著消費者對寵物健康的重視，企業必須不斷創新和提升產品質量，以滿足市場需求。Fubei的多樣化產品組合可能會吸引更多投資者的青睞，進一步推動其市場擴張。然而，市場競爭也日益激烈，其他本地及外國品牌可能會加大對市場的投入，形成新的競爭格局。未來，企業在擴展的同時，如何平衡成本與品質將成為關鍵挑戰。
